item.title: PReM：学习要保留什么以及何时刷新上下文压缩
item.summary: arXiv:2607.14327v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Efficient long-context inference is not only about reducing memory cost, but also about keeping useful contextual evidence accessible as generation proceeds.
